case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS DAYAO BONIFACIO S.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,063.39 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAO BONIFACIO S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAO BONIFACIO S.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAYAO BONIFACIO S. $2,063.39 PRINCIPAL, $54.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,118.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAO BONIFACIO S.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $646.85 AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAO BONIFACIO S.
